title: Cover
description: Opening slide — Capalyst QMS: Pharmaceutical Quality, Reimagined.

title: The Problem
description: $50M hook — pain points of paper trails, manual sign-offs, and audit panic.

title: What Capalyst Is
description: One platform, four critical modules — icon grid overview of Deviations, CAPA, Change Control, Audit Trail.

title: How It Works
description: System architecture: Users & Roles → QMS Modules → Audit Trail.

title: Dashboard
description: Live quality dashboard — KPI cards and 30-day deviation trend chart.

title: Deviation Lifecycle
description: Swimlane flowchart: Draft → Submitted → Area Review → QA Acceptance → Investigation → Root Cause → CAPA/ER → Completed, with e-sig gates.

title: CAPA Lifecycle
description: Linear flowchart: Draft → QA Review → Implementation → Efficacy Review → Closed, with efficacy loop.

title: Change Control Pipeline
description: Parallel-lane diagram: Submitted → HR/SC/Expert reviews → Works Plan → PIR → Close.

title: Compliance & Audit Trail
description: Supported frameworks — 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, ICH Q10, ISO 13485 — plus immutable log visual.

title: E-Signatures & Role-Based Access
description: Split visual: roles on the left, what each can do on the right.

title: Key Differentiators
description: 3-column comparison: Paper/spreadsheets vs Generic tools vs Capalyst.

title: ROI & Value Props
description: Three stat hero cards: 60% faster audit prep, 40% faster deviation closure, $2M+ per recall avoided.

title: Customer Fit
description: Persona cards: QA Manager, Compliance Officer, Site Director.

title: Request a Demo
description: Closing CTA — Ready to see it live? Contact and demo request details.
